landing.eyebrow: Personal AI · context that stays with you
landing.subtitle: Chats, tasks, and context always nearby.
landing.androidAppBody: Install the APK to use PersAI as an app: the same web product, native sharing, and faster access from your phone.
landing.terms: By continuing you agree to the Terms of Service

auth.signInWelcome: Sign in to get back to your chats, memory, and assistant settings.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create your account and launch your personal AI assistant.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a password reset code.
auth.forgotPasswordRequestFailed: Could not send the password reset code.
auth.resetCodeSubtitle: We sent a password reset code to {email}.
auth.passwordCreateHint: Choose a strong password that you can still recover later through email.

chat.disclaimer: Your assistant may make mistakes. Verify important information.
chat.knowledgeAddToBaseHint: Eligible documents will be indexed and become available from any chat through knowledge search.
chat.deepModeHint: Keeps this chat in the smart path. Uses more tokens, but gives the model room to escalate for harder turns.
chat.knowledgeUploadReadyDetail: {count, plural, one {# file is now available across chats} other {# files are now available across chats}}
chat.knowledgeUploadFailed: Could not add to knowledge base
chat.knowledgeUploadFailedDetail: The files stayed in the message, but they were not indexed for search from other chats.
chat.voiceTranscriptionEmptyGuidance: Please record it again a little closer to the microphone.
chat.greeting2: I'm here whenever you need me.
chat.greeting4: Let's pick up where we left off.
chat.prompt1: What can you help me with?
chat.mediaStorageFull: Media storage full: {used} MB used out of {limit} MB.
chat.mediaStorageFullGuidance: Delete old chats or files to free up space, then try uploading again.
chat.workspaceStorageFull: Workspace disk full: {used} MB used out of {limit} MB.
chat.workspaceStorageFullGuidance: The assistant's workspace is out of space. Delete old chats or ask the assistant to clean up files.
chat.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
chat.compactionHint: Context is getting heavy{tokens, select, none {} other { ({tokens})}}. Compacting keeps recent context and helps replies stay fast.
chat.compactionHintManual: Context pressure is rising{tokens, select, none {} other { ({tokens})}}. Compact older context when you want to free room while keeping recent turns.
chat.compactionHintManualDetail: Use manual compaction when you want tighter control over what stays in the active context window.
chat.compactionHintAuto: Context pressure is rising{tokens, select, none {} other { ({tokens})}}. This plan can auto-compact older context after a reply to stay within budget.
chat.compactionHintAutoDetail: You can still compact now manually, but PersAI may also compress older context automatically when the turn finishes.
chat.billingReturnSuccessBody: Trusted payment confirmation has been received. Your paid access is now active.
chat.billingReturnPackageSuccessBody: Trusted payment confirmation has been received. The purchased package has already been added to your available limits.
chat.billingReturnFailedBody: Your current plan is unchanged. Open Pricing to try again or choose another payment method.
chat.billingReturnPackageFailedBody: Your additional limits are unchanged. Open Packages to try again or choose another payment method.
chat.billingReturnPendingBody: Payment was started, but final confirmation has not arrived yet. Your current plan stays active until verification finishes.
chat.billingReturnPackagePendingTitle: Package purchase confirmation is still pending
chat.billingReturnPackagePendingBody: Payment was started, but final confirmation has not arrived yet. Additional limits will appear as soon as verification finishes.
chat.chatMessageLimitBody: Continue in a new chat to keep going. Upgrade if you want longer conversations without these limits.
chat.chatMessageLimitDetail: Your current plan keeps individual chats shorter so they stay tidy and predictable.
chat.chatActiveLimitTitle: You already have enough active chats
chat.chatActiveLimitBody: Keep going in one of your existing chats, or archive one you no longer need.
chat.chatActiveLimitDetail: This internal limit is usually rare, but the app will not open another active thread until one is freed.
chat.compactionExhaustedBody: Older context was auto-compacted {count} times, but this thread is still at the current plan limit{tokens, select, none {} other { ({tokens})}}.
chat.compactionExhaustedDetail: You can keep talking here, but answer quality may have less continuity. Starting a new chat or upgrading the plan gives the assistant more room.
chat.compactionAutoSuccessBody: Older context was compacted after the last reply, so recent context stays available without carrying the full backlog.
chat.compactionAutoSuccessDetail: PersAI compressed older context after the reply because this chat was close to its plan context budget.
chat.issueCompactionUnavailableGuidance: Send a normal message in this thread, wait for a reply, then try “Compact now” again.

home.greeting2: Ready to pick up where we left off?
home.greeting3: How can I help you today?
home.prompt1: What can you help me with?

setup.step0Subtitle: Your assistant needs to know you to serve you better.
setup.namePlaceholder: How should your assistant call you?
setup.step1Subtitle: Give it a name and a face. This is who you'll be talking to every day after first setup or recreate.
setup.describeCharacter: Describe the character in your own words
setup.instructionPlaceholder: Warm, observant, proactive, but not pushy...
setup.instructionHint: Describe in your own words — like you would to a friend.
setup.archetypeSectionHint: Pick a base style. The sliders refine delivery, and the text on the right adds your nuances.
setup.presetCustomDesc: Start from scratch — write your own
setup.step3Subtitle: Hear how your assistant sounds before you create it.
setup.previewLoading: Creating your assistant — this takes about 10-15 seconds...
setup.skillsSubtitle: Optional. Choose Skills now, or enable them later from Assistant Settings.
setup.termsNotice: By creating your assistant you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
setup.recoverModeBody: An assistant already exists for this account, so setup will continue by updating that draft explicitly instead of silently retrying create after a conflict.
setup.recreateModeBody: This workspace already has an assistant record, so setup will explicitly reuse it and rebuild the draft instead of pretending a fresh create is happening.
setup.createSuccessBody: Your draft is now published and the welcome chat is getting ready. Opening the first conversation with {name}.
setup.sessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again and refresh the page.
setup.createFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

skills.title: Professional Skills
skills.emptyTitle: No professional Skills are available yet
skills.emptyBody: When an admin publishes Skills, they will appear here for you to enable.
skills.setupHelp: Enable or disable professional Skills for this assistant.
skills.settingsHelp: Enable or disable professional Skills for this assistant.
skills.planUnavailableHint: Skills are available on another plan. You can review the catalog, but Skills cannot be enabled on your current plan.

disabledReason.skill_limit_reached: Your plan limit is reached. Disable another Skill first.
disabledReason.skill_archived: This Skill is archived and can no longer be enabled.
disabledReason.plan_limit_exceeded: This Skill was disabled because the plan limit changed.

settings.title: Assistant settings
settings.androidAppBody: Download the current Android APK. The version is updated from the release build, so this link points at the latest published file.
settings.characterBasicsHelp: Set the assistant's name, gender, and base voice here. This shapes presentation and the available voice choices.
settings.voiceSimpleHelp: Only the base voice chooser remains here, without the older legacy fields.
settings.voiceDescription: Base delivery and voice settings for the current primary native tts provider. Personality and live intonation still come from the assistant persona and the model's tone choice.
settings.voiceToneNote: The model still chooses moment-to-moment intonation when it calls tts; this section only fixes the base voice and delivery style.
settings.voicePrimaryProviderHint: Only the base voice for the current primary TTS provider is shown here: {provider}.
settings.voiceElevenlabsNotConfigured: ElevenLabs is the current primary provider, but its admin API key is not configured yet.
settings.voiceElevenlabsUnavailable: The ElevenLabs voice list is temporarily unavailable.
settings.voiceNoVoicesForGender: No matching voices are available for the current assistant gender.
settings.voiceGenderFilterHint: The list is filtered by assistant gender: male -> male voices, female -> female voices, neutral -> all voices.
settings.voiceElevenlabsVoiceIdPlaceholder: Optional voice ID from your ElevenLabs workspace
settings.voiceElevenlabsHint: If ElevenLabs is selected as primary but no voice ID is saved here, PersAI will fall back to Yandex or OpenAI for this assistant.
settings.behaviorHelp: Describe how the assistant should speak, behave, handle tone, and show initiative. This is the most important text block for the assistant's character.
settings.behaviorExample: Example: calm and direct, but warm; asks clarifying questions; does not push; helps carry tasks through to completion.
settings.traitControlsHelp: Use the 10-step sliders only when the main behavior description is not enough.
settings.resetClearing: Recreating assistant state: chats, memory, tasks, published versions, materialized runtime bundles/specs, and media artifacts are being cleared. This may take a few seconds.
settings.resetScopeWarning: Recreate will delete chats, memory, and assistant settings.
settings.knowledgeDescription: Manage uploaded documents that PersAI indexes for cross-chat knowledge search.
settings.filesDescription: One place for uploaded, generated, and assistant-created files. Files stay separate from Knowledge unless you explicitly add them there later.
settings.filesEmptyBody: Uploads, generated media, and assistant-created files will appear here.
settings.filesDocumentCurrentOutputPinned: This file is the current delivered output of a document version. Delete or archive the document instead of removing the output file directly.
settings.filesCleanupConfirm: Only temporary voice/cache artifacts will be removed. User files and assistant-created files stay.
settings.skillsDescription: Choose admin-published Skills this assistant can use in prompts and source-aware retrieval.
settings.knowledgeManagerHelp: Upload, reindex, and remove assistant-private documents from one place.
settings.knowledgeUploadInvalid: Select document-like files such as PDF, DOCX, TXT, XLSX, or JSON.
settings.knowledgeUploadFailedStandalone: Failed to upload one or more knowledge documents.
settings.knowledgeDeleteFailed: Failed to delete the knowledge document.
settings.knowledgeReindexFailed: Failed to reindex the knowledge document.
settings.knowledgeEmptyBody: Upload product notes, manuals, or other reference files and they will become searchable across chats.
settings.memoryCloseOpenLoopFailed: Failed to close this open loop.
settings.wsMemoryForgetFailed: Failed to forget this workspace memory.
settings.userTasksHelp: Personal reminders and actions the assistant has scheduled for the user.
settings.assistantActionsDescription: Quiet background actions the assistant sets for itself and will revisit later.
settings.noAssistantActions: No assistant actions scheduled right now.
settings.reminderDescription: PersAI sends reminders to the preferred connected channel and falls back if it is unavailable.
settings.paymentSettingsDescription: Change plan, manage auto-renew, and review payment details.
settings.paymentSettingsNonRecurringDescription: Change plan and review payment details and access period.
settings.billingSettingsQuietHint: Payment updates are applied automatically after confirmation.
settings.billingSettingsUnknownHint: We couldn't refresh payment details, so some fields may be temporarily unavailable.
settings.billingRecurringMigrationInProgress: We're checking whether recurring charges can move to SBP. Until the provider confirms it, auto-renew stays on the current payment method.
settings.billingRecurringMigrationFailedSbpFallba: The SBP payment succeeded, but recurring charges are still linked to the previous bank card until the provider confirms the transfer.
settings.billingRecurringMigrationFailedGeneric: We couldn't switch the recurring payment method yet. Auto-renew stays on the previously confirmed payment method.
settings.billingDateUnavailable: This date will appear after the next successful update.
settings.billingRecurringMethodNotActive: Not applicable while auto-renew is off
settings.billingAutoRenewDisabled: The subscription will end after the current paid period.
settings.billingSubscriptionRestored: Subscription restored and auto-renew is enabled again.
settings.billingAutoRenewBindStarted: Finish linking your card to enable auto-renew.
settings.billingRestoreSubscriptionBindStarted: Finish linking your card to restore the subscription.
settings.billingDisableAutoRenewConfirm: Cancel the subscription after the current paid period ends?
settings.billingDisableAutoRenewConfirmHelp: Your current access stays active until the paid period ends. After that, the subscription ends and recurring payments stop.
settings.billingSessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again and retry.
settings.billingPaymentMethodUnavailable: Right now auto-renew can only be turned on with a bank card.
settings.billingActionFailed: Could not update billing settings. Try again.
settings.monthlyMediaQuotaSettlementHint: Media quota is reserved before generation and charged only after delivery succeeds.
settings.toolLimitsCount: {count, plural, one {# active tool} other {# active tools}}
settings.noToolLimits: No plan-managed tool limits are active on this plan.
settings.createFromMain: Create one from the main screen.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.notAvailableDesc: Your current plan does not include Telegram integration. Contact your administrator to upgrade.
telegram.step2Desc: Send /newbot and follow the instructions to pick a name and username
telegram.step3Desc: Copy the API token BotFather gives you and paste it below
telegram.connectedSuccess: Bot connected. Finish owner claim in Telegram.
telegram.afterNote1: Open the bot chat and complete owner claim with the 6-digit code from PersAI
telegram.afterNote2: Conversations sync with the web chat memory
telegram.afterNote3: You can configure parse mode and message routing
telegram.autoCompactionDesc: Compacts older context when the conversation gets long.
telegram.deepModeDefaultDesc: For harder messages: thinks deeper and may use more tokens.
telegram.parseModeMarkdownFootnote: Clean formatting for bold text, code, and links.
telegram.addBotToGroup: Add the bot to a Telegram group — it will appear here automatically.
telegram.systemNoteProviderSurface: Telegram uses one provider and one interaction surface binding.
telegram.systemNoteOwnerOnlyDm: Direct messages are available only to the confirmed owner.
telegram.systemNoteWebControlPlane: Assistant configuration stays in the web control panel.
telegram.disconnectFailed: Could not disconnect. Use "Reconnect" to update the token instead.
telegram.claimInstructionShort: Tap “Find bot” and send this code in a private chat with the bot. That Telegram account becomes the assistant owner.
telegram.claimRequiredDesc: The code is accepted only in the private bot chat. After confirmation, the bot sends a system message and PersAI refreshes the status.
telegram.findBotHint: If Telegram did not open right away, open the app and search for the bot by username {username}. Then send the code from PersAI in that chat.
telegram.copyCodeFailed: Could not copy the claim code.
telegram.resendOwnerMessageFailed: Could not resend the Telegram message.
telegram.resendOwnerMessageHint: Resend becomes available after the assistant owner sends at least one message to the bot in Telegram.
telegram.invalidTokenTitle: Telegram token is no longer valid
telegram.invalidTokenDesc: Reconnect the bot with a fresh token to restore Telegram delivery.

pricing.title: Choose your PersAI
pricing.subtitle: Clear plans, clear limits, and no extra noise.
pricing.freePlanSettingsHint: Switch to FREE is available in
pricing.freePlanBillingLoadingHint: Checking whether FREE is available or already scheduled for your current billing state...
pricing.trialFreePlanHint: Your current plan is TRIAL. If you do not start a paid subscription, FREE will be enabled after the trial ends.
pricing.checkoutStartFailed: Could not open the payment page. Try again.
pricing.sessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again and retry.
pricing.planUnavailable: This plan cannot be changed right now. Reload the page and try again.
pricing.paymentMethodUnavailable: This plan change is currently available only with a bank card.
pricing.billingStateUnavailable: Could not load your current plan details. Reload the page and try again.
pricing.planChangeNotSupported: This plan change is not available right now.
pricing.reviewFreeBody: Your current paid access stays active until {date}. After that, PersAI switches to FREE.
pricing.reviewDowngradeBody: Your current paid access stays active until {date}. After that, {targetPlan} becomes active at {price}.
pricing.reviewUpgradeBody: After payment, PersAI switches from {currentPlan} to {targetPlan} immediately. The new billing cycle restarts from {date}.
pricing.reviewDowngradeHelp: This change will take effect after the current paid period ends. Until then, your current renewal and access dates stay the same.
pricing.reviewUpgradeHelp: {targetPlan} becomes available immediately after successful payment. The full new plan price {price} is charged now, and the next recurring date moves to the new cycle.
pricing.switchToFreeScheduled: FREE is scheduled for the next billing date.
pricing.downgradeScheduled: The plan change is scheduled for the next billing date.
pricing.trialDays: {days, plural, one {# day free trial} other {# days free trial}}
pricing.emptyBody: Plans will appear here as soon as they become available.

billingCheckout.title: Checkout
billingCheckout.subtitle: The subscription activates after payment is confirmed.
billingCheckout.subtitlePackage: This is a one-time payment. The purchased limits will be added to your available capacity right after payment confirmation.
billingCheckout.subtitleBind: Bind a bank card for future auto-renew charges. Your current access period does not restart.
billingCheckout.subtitleManagedUpgrade: You are paying the full new plan amount now. The new billing cycle starts immediately after payment.
billingCheckout.sessionExpired: Session expired. Sign in again and try again.
billingCheckout.loadFailed: Could not load the payment intent.
billingCheckout.paymentHelpBodyCloudpayments: Payment is processed through CloudPayments in a secure payment form.
billingCheckout.paymentHelpBodyActivation: The subscription activates only after payment is confirmed.
billingCheckout.paymentHelpBodyBind: This page only links a card for future automatic payments. Your current access period stays the same.
billingCheckout.paymentHelpBodyManagedUpgrade: This upgrade charges the full new plan now and moves the next recurring charge to the new cycle date.
billingCheckout.paymentHelpBodyRecurring: Auto-renewal can be turned off later.
billingCheckout.paymentHelpBodyOneTime: This is a one-time payment for the selected method. Auto-renew will not start from this payment.
billingCheckout.paymentFailed: Payment was not completed. You can try again.
billingCheckout.pendingCheckoutBody: Payment has already been started. We are waiting for confirmation before updating your plan.
billingCheckout.completedCheckoutBody: This payment has already been completed. You can safely return to chat.
billingCheckout.closedCheckoutTitle: This payment page is no longer available
billingCheckout.closedCheckoutBody: This payment attempt is already closed. Your current plan stays unchanged unless trusted confirmation has already activated the new one.
billingCheckout.expiredCheckoutBody: This payment session expired before completion. Start a new payment from Plans to try again.
billingCheckout.legacyCheckoutTitle: This payment was created in an older flow
billingCheckout.legacyCheckoutBody: This saved payment attempt was created before the current payment page. Start a new payment from Plans.
billingCheckout.formUnavailable: Could not prepare the payment form.
billingCheckout.unsupportedMode: Payment details are unavailable. Return to Plans and try again.

profile.profileDetailsHelp: Update the first and last name shown on your PersAI account.
profile.avatarHelp: Upload a profile photo so it appears in your account and user menu.
profile.passwordHelp: Enter your current password first, then choose a new one.
profile.passwordHint: If you forgot it, you can recover it from the sign-in screen.
profile.passwordMismatch: The new password and confirmation do not match.

offline.title: Internet connection required
offline.message: PersAI needs an active connection to keep your assistant in sync. Check your network and try again.

send.failedHelper: Message hasn't been delivered. Retry or cancel to send a new one.
